{{Infobox character
| name = Colossal Moon-eater
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Colossal Moon-eater]] is a flying sacred beast with blood [[aura]] that has an aspect of preservation.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Colossal Moon-eater]] carries a small town strapped to its back.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Moon-eater possesses authority that could affect transportation out of a location.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Sacred beasts]]
